overview.description: The iShares LifePath Target Date 2070 ETF (ITDJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target date asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests in equity, fixed income, and money market ETFs using an asset allocation strategy that shifts exposure as the target retirement date approaches. The fund is intended for investors who anticipate retiring around 2070 ITDJ was launched on Nov 12, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
